issue.title: naitam.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://naitam.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnaitam.com%2F)

### Comment
> Subject:
> False Positive - Request to Review naitam.com
> 
> Message:
> 
> Hello AdGuard Team,
> 
> Our domain https://naitam.com is currently classified as a dangerous/phishing website by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> We believe this is a false positive.
> 
> The previous version of this website had been inactive for several years and may have been compromised in the past while hosted on a different shared hosting provider.
> 
> The website has now been completely rebuilt from scratch and migrated to a new hosting environment. No old source code, configuration files, or database from the previous website has been reused.
> 
> We have also verified the current website using several independent security services:
> 
> - Google Safe Browsing: No unsafe content found
> - VirusTotal: 0 security vendors detected any threat
> - Sucuri SiteCheck: No malware found, not blacklisted
> - URLVoid: 0 blacklist detections
> 
> The current website is clean and does not contain phishing pages, malware, malicious scripts, or redirects.
> 
> We kindly request that you review the current status of the domain and remove it from the AdGuard DNS phishing/malicious database if appropriate.
> 
> Screenshots of the security scan results are attached.
> 
> Thank you for your time and assistance.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/tiwalbya5ggg800gwkccgcw0gwcwkskndhz3rpi4hc.png?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 2</summary>

  ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/cb5on0ldkbkkkwo80w408g08ssgs8sw3flwwwpnhrs.png?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 3</summary>

  ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/aiwy40jhpuokcgk8c00wccko4cg48ksphxwbwqu5dc.png?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/bpil3lfo9mgwwkkoc0s8wo8o8gggc00zkuzoq6z85c.png?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Windows 11`
Browser: | Chrome
